rationale: Hydration now fetches primary and summary report artifacts concurrently with asyncio.gather.
Execution report projections now preserve compact artifact refs end to end instead of re-injecting full artifact metadata.
Top-level Gemini review summary only restated the inline comments and required no separate change.
Report hydration now ignores incomplete report.primary and report.summary artifacts and only projects COMPLETE artifacts.
Top-level Codex review wrapper contained no standalone actionable feedback beyond the inline comment already addressed.
Removed the unused user binding from _client_with_service while preserving dependency override side effects.
Removed the unused admin test user binding in test_list_executions_passes_temporal_filters_for_admin.
Removed an unused user binding in the send-message signal test setup.
Removed an unused user binding in the skip-dependency signal test setup.
Dropped the unused ArtifactRefModel import after switching execution report projections to CompactArtifactRefModel.
